sessions.title: The Quiet Room
sessions.subtitle: A gentle guided meditation to help your body relax and your mind soften into sleep.
sessions.description: A gentle guided meditation to help your body relax and your mind soften into sleep. Best played in a quiet room while your breathing and body gradually soften.
